_comment: Golden canaries for known Fission parity gaps vs Ghidra. expect_status=mismatch locks the gap until a fix lands; then update the case to expect_status=match.

cases.name: cfg_parity__count_bits__gcc-O0
cases.notes: Topology match (block starts + edge pairs). Span encoding diffs are dual-only.

cases.notes: Topology match (block starts + edge pairs). Span encoding diffs are dual-only.

cases.name: pcode_parity__count_bits__gcc-O0
cases.notes: Strict primary uses space_selector abstraction for LOAD/STORE first input (encoding-invariant). Opcode names normalized. Literal space-table ids remain in dual metric literal_full_match only.

cases.notes: Strict primary uses space_selector abstraction for LOAD/STORE first input (encoding-invariant). Opcode names normalized. Literal space-table ids remain in dual metric literal_full_match only.

cases.name: abi_parity__count_bits__gcc-O2
cases.notes: Windows x64 O2: recovered param locations should align (ecx/rcx aliases).
